notes.title: Azure RBAC key roles
notes.body:
Owner: Full access + delegation
Contributor: Full access, no role assignment
Reader: View only
User Access Admin: Manage user access

Best practice: Least privilege. Scope to resource group not subscription.

notes.title: Defender for Cloud key concepts
notes.body:
CSPM = Cloud Security Posture Management (free tier available)
CWPP = Cloud Workload Protection Platform (paid)

Secure Score measures your posture against security recommendations.
Maps to compliance frameworks: CIS, NIST, PCI DSS.

tuts.title: Enable Microsoft Sentinel and connect data sources
tuts.body:
1. Create a Log Analytics workspace in your preferred region
2. Navigate to Microsoft Sentinel in the Azure portal and click Add
3. Select your Log Analytics workspace and click Add Microsoft Sentinel
4. Go to Data connectors in the left menu
5. Enable key connectors: Azure Active Directory, Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Office 365, Azure Activity
6. For each connector follow the Prerequisites tab before enabling
7. Verify data is flowing: Logs > query SigninLogs or AuditLogs

Gotcha: Data can take 20-30 minutes to appear after first connection.
Cost tip: Set a daily ingestion cap in your workspace settings to avoid unexpected bills.
